buildCommand:
printf '
>>> REFUSING TO BUILD ON VERCEL.
>>> This site is prerendered by headless Chrome (scripts/prerender.mjs) over 30
>>> routes. A Vercel build container has no guaranteed Chrome, so building here
>>> would ship an empty SPA shell and silently delete 30 crawlable pages.
>>> Deployments are made by .github/workflows/deploy.yml, which builds and
>>> prerenders on a GitHub runner and ships with `vercel deploy --prebuilt`.
>>> To deploy: push to main (or open a PR) and let that workflow run.

' >&2; exit 1
